title: NIT Sikkim – Faculty – 30 Posts

basic_details.job_title: NIT Sikkim Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 30 Professor, Associate Professor and Assistant Professor Posts
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute Of Technology Sikkim (NIT Sikkim) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 30 Faculty. Candidates with M.Phil/Ph.D Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 08-04-2026, and closes on 22-05-2026. The candidate shall apply Offline through NIT Sikkim website, nitsikkim.ac.in/.

how_to_apply: Candidates must submit their applications in hard copy while also filling out an online "Candidate Summary".
seo_tags: National Institute Of Technology Sikkim Faculty Recruitment 2026
